## Device Information
- BLE name (e.g. NBPower-XXXXXXXXXXXX): 
- Firmware version (from sensor): 
- device_num (from logs): 
- AC or DC: 
- Maximum supported current: 
- Where purchased / sold under brand: 

## Status
- [ ] Connects successfully
- [ ] Reads voltage/current/energy correctly
- [ ] Charge start works
- [ ] Charge stop works
- [ ] Current limit adjustment works

## Notes

(Any quirks, differences from documentation, etc.)
